name: Baked Christmas Pudding with Brandy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Finely chopped mixed candied fruit
1/2 cup Finely chopped yellow candied pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and 1/4 cup sugar in a large mixing bowl; beat with a wooden spoon until well blended.
2. Add eggs and molasses, mixing well.
3. Dredge candied fruits and pecans in 2 tablespoons flour; set aside.
4. Combine remaining flour and baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, alternating with milk, beginning and ending with the dry mixture.
6. Stir the fruit mixture into the batter.
7. Spoon the batter into a greased and floured 2-quart ring mold. Cover with foil.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Unmold onto a serving platter. Spoon Brandy Sauce over the pudding.
10. If desired, soak sugar cubes in lemon extract. Arrange soaked sugar cubes evenly around the heat-proof serving platter and ignite just before serving.
